title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Barista Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Barista Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Barista Global Group in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barista Global Group:
Barista Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista Global Group!
